title: BSNC Supports Local Graphite Project with Significant Investment

title: New research explains “Atlantification” of the Arctic Ocean
summary: New research by an international team of scientists explains what’s behind a stalled trend in Arctic Ocean sea ice loss since 2007. The findings indicate that stronger declines in sea ice will occur when an atmospheric feature known as the Arctic dipole reverses itself in its recurring cycle. The many environmental responses to the Arctic dipole are described in a paper published online today in...

title: A Path to Dialogue: The Arctic for EU-Russia Relations
summary: The EU-Russia relationship is complex, but the Arctic may offer a site for future cooperation in the face of global tensions. The post A Path to Dialogue: The Arctic for EU-Russia Relations appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
